origin.capability_match: Receive allocated $BERA tokens subject to vesting schedule

attack_surface.data_description: Records and processes related to token distribution and claim fulfillment for Core Contributor (Actor ID 9).

trust_boundary_risk.boundary_name: Vesting System Record Keeping and Distribution Process

security_gap.gap_description: Lack of verifiable, non-repudiable proof of token distribution or correct claim processing, allowing the distributing entity to falsely deny distribution or dispute legitimate claims from Core Contributor (Actor ID 9).

actor_risk.description: The entity or administrator responsible for token distribution (acting on behalf of the system) falsely denies or incorrectly records the fulfillment of Core Contributor's (Actor ID 9) token claim due to flawed processes or malicious intent.

behavioral_risk.rationale: If the system can repudiate its token distribution obligations or actions without verifiable proof, Core Contributors may unfairly lose access to their vested tokens, leading to disputes and loss of trust.

assumptions: The process for distributing vested tokens or acknowledging claims lacks sufficient non-repudiable evidence (e.g., auditable on-chain transactions for all distributions, signed attestations for off-chain steps).
Disputes can arise if a Core Contributor (Actor ID 9) claims non-receipt and the system cannot definitively prove distribution.

mitigation.strategy: Ensure all token distributions to Core Contributors are executed via transparent and auditable on-chain transactions. Maintain secure, immutable, and independently verifiable logs for any off-chain claim processing steps. Provide clear claim receipts or transaction IDs to contributors.

description: The system or entity managing token vesting for 'Big Bera Labs Member / Initial Core Contributor' (Actor ID 9) fails to provide non-repudiable proof of token distribution, or falsely denies a legitimate claim, leading to a dispute over received tokens.

trace_source.matched_capability: Receive allocated $BERA tokens subject to vesting schedule
